<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Valider Fiches de Présence </h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/F4447578-5086-4586-BD12-ED4D7EFD0B49" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Valider Fiches de Présence ">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />

					<value>oui</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-non-label')" />
					<value>non</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group>
			<label ref="jr:itext('repreat_attendance-label')" />
			<repeat vellum:jr__count="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:count="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repreat_attendance" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/repreat_attendance/display" ref="/data/repreat_attendance/display" />
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/save" ref="/data/save">
			<label ref="jr:itext('save-label')" />
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

											<create>

												<case_name />
												<owner_id />

								<label_fiche_deja_signe />

						</item>
					</repeat_travailleur>
					<photo_fiche_de_presence_groupe />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/pays_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/pays_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/pays_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/pays_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/pays_nom" nodeset="/data/location_information/pays_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/pays_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/pays_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/region_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/region_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/location_id]/@region_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/location_id]/@region_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/region_nom" nodeset="/data/location_information/region_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/region_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/region_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/region_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/region_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/region_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/region_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/district_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/district_id" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/location_id]/@district_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/location_id]/@district_id" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/url_maps_gps_ucr" nodeset="/data/url_maps_gps_ucr" vellum:calculate="concat("[Lien Maps](https://maps.google.com/?q=", #form/gps_latitude, ",", #form/gps_longitude, ")")" calculate="concat("[Lien Maps](https://maps.google.com/?q=", /data/gps_latitude, ",", /data/gps_longitude, ")")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/photo_attendance_file" nodeset="/data/photo_attendance_file" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/category" nodeset="/data/category" calculate="'COVID19'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_utilisateur" nodeset="/data/grp_utilisateur" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_utilisateur/utilisateur_superviseur" nodeset="/data/grp_utilisateur/utilisateur_superviseur" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/superviseur" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_utilisateur/utilisateur_user_role" nodeset="/data/grp_utilisateur/utilisateur_user_role" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/user_role" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_utilisateur/userid_c" nodeset="/data/grp_utilisateur/userid_c" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_utilisateur/utilisateur_formateur" nodeset="/data/grp_utilisateur/utilisateur_formateur" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/formateur" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_workers_count" nodeset="/data/grp_workers_count" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_workers_count/count_cpc" nodeset="/data/grp_workers_count/count_cpc" vellum:calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@category = 'COVID19'][selected(campagne_id, #form/campagne_id)][categorie = 'dps_covid_membre_pc_cpc'])" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@category = 'COVID19'][selected(campagne_id, /data/campagne_id)][categorie = 'dps_covid_membre_pc_cpc'])" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_workers_count/count_clc" nodeset="/data/grp_workers_count/count_clc" vellum:calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@category = 'COVID19'][selected(campagne_id, #form/campagne_id)][categorie = 'eczs_covid_membre_clc'])" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_nouveau'][@status = 'open'][@category = 'COVID19'][selected(campagne_id, /data/campagne_id)][categorie = 'eczs_covid_membre_clc'])" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_workers_count/count_workers_all" nodeset="/data/grp_workers_count/count_workers_all" vellum:calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = #form/location_information/location_id][travailleur_role = #form/worker_category][campagne_id = #form/campagne_id])" calculate="count(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = /data/location_information/location_id][travailleur_role = /data/worker_category][campagne_id = /data/campagne_id])" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/@ids" vellum:value="join(' ', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = #form/grp_geographiques/location_id][travailleur_role = #form/worker_category][campagne_id = #form/campagne_id]/@case_id)" value="join(' ', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = /data/grp_geographiques/location_id][travailleur_role = /data/worker_category][campagne_id = /data/campagne_id]/@case_id)" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/@count" value="count-selected(/data/repeat_travailleur/@ids)" />
			<setvalue event="jr-insert" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/item/@index" value="int(/data/repeat_travailleur/@current_index)" />
			<setvalue event="jr-insert" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/item/@id" value="selected-at(/data/repeat_travailleur/@ids, ../@index)" />

	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/location_information" ref="/data/location_information" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('location_information-label')" />
		</group>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/campagne_id" ref="/data/campagne_id">
			<label ref="jr:itext('campagne_id-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label">
				<label ref="campagne_label" />
				<value ref="campagne_id" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/worker_category" ref="/data/worker_category" appearance="combobox">
			<label ref="jr:itext('worker_category-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = /data/location_information/location_type]" vellum:nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = #form/location_information/location_type]">
				<label ref="categorie_name" />
				<value ref="categorie_code" />
				<sort ref="categorie_name" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<input vellum:ref="#form/date_de_la_fiche_de_presence" ref="/data/date_de_la_fiche_de_presence">
			<label ref="jr:itext('date_de_la_fiche_de_presence-label')" />
		</input>
		<select vellum:ref="#form/list_worker_present" ref="/data/list_worker_present">
			<label ref="jr:itext('list_worker_present-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = /data/grp_geographiques/location_id][travailleur_role = /data/worker_category][campagne_id = /data/campagne_id]" vellum:nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = #form/grp_geographiques/location_id][travailleur_role = #form/worker_category][campagne_id = #form/campagne_id]">
				<label ref="case_name" />
				<value ref="@case_id" />
			</itemset>
		</select>
		<trigger vellum:ref="#form/lbl_no_worker_mobile" ref="/data/lbl_no_worker_mobile" appearance="minimal">
			<label ref="jr:itext('lbl_no_worker_mobile-label')" />
			<alert ref="jr:itext('lbl_no_worker_mobile-constraintMsg')" />
		</trigger>
		<group>
			<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/item-label')" />
			<repeat jr:count="/data/repeat_travailleur/@count" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat_travailleur/item" nodeset="/data/repeat_travailleur/item">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/item/display" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/item/display">
					<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_role" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_role" appearance="field-list">
						<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_role-label')" />
						<trigger vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_role/label_travailleur_name" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_role/label_travailleur_name" appearance="minimal">
							<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_role/label_travailleur_name-label')" />
						</trigger>
						<select1 vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_role/travailleur_role" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_role/travailleur_role">
							<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_role/travailleur_role-label')" />
							<itemset nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][index/parent = /data/repeat_travailleur/item/display/travailleur_selected][campagne_id = /data/campagne_id]" vellum:nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][index/parent = #form/repeat_travailleur/item/display/travailleur_selected][campagne_id = #form/campagne_id]">
								<label ref="travailleur_role_nom" />
								<value ref="@case_id" />
							</itemset>
						</select1>
					</group>
					<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_group" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_group" appearance="field-list">
						<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_group-label')" />
						<trigger vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_group/label_travailleur_name" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_group/label_travailleur_name" appearance="minimal">
							<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/item/display/display_group/label_travailleur_name-label')" />
						</trigger>

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite" nodeset="/data/identite" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/nom" nodeset="/data/identite/nom" type="xsd:string" constraint="not(regex(., '[0-9]+'))" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('identite/nom-constraintMsg')" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/gender" nodeset="/data/identite/gender" required="true()" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/telephone_mm" nodeset="/data/identite/telephone_mm" type="xsd:string" constraint="string-length(string(.)) = 8" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('identite/telephone_mm-constraintMsg')" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/nom_majuscule" nodeset="/data/identite/nom_majuscule" vellum:calculate="upper-case(#form/identite/nom)" calculate="upper-case(/data/identite/nom)" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/genre_nom_complet" nodeset="/data/identite/genre_nom_complet" vellum:calculate="concat(#form/identite/gender, " ", #form/identite/nom_majuscule, " ", #form/identite/prenom_format)" calculate="concat(/data/identite/gender, " ", /data/identite/nom_majuscule, " ", /data/identite/prenom_format)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/location_id" nodeset="/data/identite/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/photo_signature" nodeset="/data/identite/photo_signature" vellum:calculate="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/signature" calculate="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/signature" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/url_photo_signature" nodeset="/data/identite/url_photo_signature" vellum:calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/identite/photo_signature)" calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/identite/photo_signature)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/url_photo_signature_ucr" nodeset="/data/identite/url_photo_signature_ucr" vellum:calculate="concat("[Voir Signature](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/identite/photo_signature, ")")" calculate="concat("[Voir Signature](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/identite/photo_signature, ")")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/location_code" nodeset="/data/identite/location_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/location_type" nodeset="/data/identite/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/location_nom" nodeset="/data/identite/location_nom" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/pays_id" nodeset="/data/identite/pays_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@national_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/pays_code" nodeset="/data/identite/pays_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/identite/pays_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/identite/pays_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/pays_nom" nodeset="/data/identite/pays_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/identite/pays_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/identite/pays_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/region_id" nodeset="/data/identite/region_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@region_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/region_code" nodeset="/data/identite/region_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/identite/region_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/identite/region_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/region_nom" nodeset="/data/identite/region_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/identite/region_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/identite/region_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/district_id" nodeset="/data/identite/district_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@district_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/district_code" nodeset="/data/identite/district_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/identite/district_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/identite/district_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/district_nom" nodeset="/data/identite/district_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/identite/district_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/identite/district_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/aire_id" nodeset="/data/identite/aire_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/@aire_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/aire_code" nodeset="/data/identite/aire_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/identite/aire_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/identite/aire_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/aire_nom" nodeset="/data/identite/aire_nom" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/identite/aire_id]/name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/identite/aire_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/worker_location_id" nodeset="/data/identite/worker_location_id" vellum:calculate="#form/identite/location_id" calculate="/data/identite/location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/worker_location_code" nodeset="/data/identite/worker_location_code" vellum:calculate="#form/identite/location_code" calculate="/data/identite/location_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/worker_location_nom" nodeset="/data/identite/worker_location_nom" vellum:calculate="#form/identite/location_nom" calculate="/data/identite/location_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/id_utilisateur" nodeset="/data/identite/id_utilisateur" vellum:calculate="#user/username" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/username" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/deviceid" nodeset="/data/identite/deviceid" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/context/deviceid" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/identite/commcare_gps_point" nodeset="/data/identite/commcare_gps_point" calculate="/data/meta/location" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/recto" nodeset="/data/recto" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/recto/photo_nin_recto" nodeset="/data/recto/photo_nin_recto" type="binary" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/recto/photo_value_recto" nodeset="/data/recto/photo_value_recto" vellum:calculate="#form/recto/photo_nin_recto" calculate="/data/recto/photo_nin_recto" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/photo_verso" nodeset="/data/photo_verso" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/photo_verso/photo_nin_verso" nodeset="/data/photo_verso/photo_nin_verso" type="binary" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/photo_verso/photo_value_verso" nodeset="/data/photo_verso/photo_value_verso" vellum:calculate="#form/photo_verso/photo_nin_verso" calculate="/data/photo_verso/photo_nin_verso" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite" nodeset="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/engagement_lbl" nodeset="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/engagement_lbl" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/signature" nodeset="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/signature" type="binary" required="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/engage_confidentialite" nodeset="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/engage_confidentialite" calculate="true()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/url_photo_nin_recto" nodeset="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/url_photo_nin_recto" vellum:calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/recto/photo_value_recto)" calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/recto/photo_value_recto)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/url_photo_nin_verso" nodeset="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/url_photo_nin_verso" vellum:calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/photo_verso/photo_value_verso)" calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/photo_verso/photo_value_verso)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/url_photo_nin_ucr_recto" nodeset="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/url_photo_nin_ucr_recto" vellum:calculate="concat("[Voir Pièce d'identité](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/recto/photo_value_recto, ")")" calculate="concat("[Voir Pièce d'identité](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/recto/photo_value_recto, ")")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/url_photo_nin_ucr_verso" nodeset="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/url_photo_nin_ucr_verso" vellum:calculate="concat("[Voir Pièce d'identité](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/photo_verso/photo_value_verso, ")")" calculate="concat("[Voir Pièce d'identité](https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/photo_verso/photo_value_verso, ")")" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="fra" default="">
					<text id="identite-label">
						<value>Identite</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/prenom-label">
						<value>Prénom</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/prenom-constraintMsg">
						<value>Le nom ne doit pas contenir de chiffres.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/nom-label">
						<value>Nom</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/nom-constraintMsg">
						<value>Le nom ne doit pas contenir de chiffres.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/gender-label">
						<value>Genre</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/gender-Homme-label">
						<value>Homme</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/gender-Femme-label">
						<value>Femme</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/fonction-label">
						<value>Fonction :</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/telephone_mm-label">
						<value>Numero Téléphone</value>
					</text>
					<text id="identite/telephone_mm-constraintMsg">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone n'a pas le bon format: il doit contenir 8 chiffres.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="recto-label">
						<value>Prendre une photo recto</value>
					</text>
					<text id="recto/photo_nin_recto-label">
						<value>Prendre une photo recto de la Carte Nationale d'Identité</value>
					</text>
					<text id="photo_verso-label">
						<value>Prendre une photo verso</value>
					</text>
					<text id="photo_verso/photo_nin_verso-label">
						<value>Prendre une photo verso de la Carte Nationale d'Identité</value>
					</text>
					<text id="engagement_de_confidentialite-label">
						<value>ENGAGEMENT DE CONFIDENTIALITE</value>
					</text>
					<text id="engagement_de_confidentialite/engagement_lbl-label">
						<value>Je soussigné/e **<output value="/data/identite/genre_nom_complet" vellum:value="#form/identite/genre_nom_complet" />**, téléphone :  **<output value="/data/identite/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#form/identite/telephone_mm" />**,  exerçant les fonctions de **<output value="/data/identite/fonction" vellum:value="#form/identite/fonction" />**  au sein du Ministère de la Santé.

Dans le cadre de mes interventions, je suis amené/e à accéder à des données à caractère personnel et sensible.

Je m’engage en particulier à :

* ne pas utiliser les données auxquelles je peux accéder à des fins autres que celles prévues par mes attributions ;
* ne divulguer ces données qu’aux personnes dûment autorisées, en raison de leurs fonctions, à en recevoir communication, qu’il s’agisse de personnes privées, publiques, physiques ou morales ;
* ne faire aucune copie de ces données sauf à ce que cela soit nécessaire à l’exécution de mes fonctions ;
* prendre toutes les mesures conformes aux usages et à l’état de l’art dans le cadre de mes attributions afin d’éviter l’utilisation détournée ou frauduleuse de ces données ;
* prendre toutes précautions conformes aux usages et à l’état de l’art pour préserver la sécurité physique et logique de ces données ;
* m’assurer, dans la limite de mes attributions, que seuls des moyens de communication sécurisés seront utilisés pour transférer ces données ;
* en cas de cessation de mes fonctions, restituer intégralement les données, fichiers informatiques et tout support d’information relatif à ces données.

Cet engagement de confidentialité, en vigueur pendant toute la durée de mes fonctions, demeurera effectif, sans limitation de durée après la cessation de mes fonctions, quelle qu’en soit la cause, dès lors que cet engagement concerne l’utilisation et la communication de données à caractère personnel.

**J’ai été informé que toute violation du présent engagement m’expose à des sanctions disciplinaires et pénales conformément à la réglementation en vigueur, notamment au regard de la Loi n°2019-014 relative à la protection des données à caractère personnel.**



Fait à **<output value="/data/identite/region_nom" vellum:value="#form/identite/region_nom" />**, le **<output value="/data/identite/date_du_jour_format" vellum:value="#form/identite/date_du_jour_format" />**

**<output value="/data/identite/genre_nom_complet" vellum:value="#form/identite/genre_nom_complet" />**

-----------------------------------o-----------------------------------
</value>
						<value form="markdown">Je soussigné/e **<output value="/data/identite/genre_nom_complet" vellum:value="#form/identite/genre_nom_complet" />**, téléphone :  **<output value="/data/identite/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#form/identite/telephone_mm" />**,  exerçant les fonctions de **<output value="/data/identite/fonction" vellum:value="#form/identite/fonction" />**  au sein du Ministère de la Santé.

						<value>Votre Signature   :</value>
					</text>

				<translation lang="en">
					<text id="identite-label">

					<text id="engagement_de_confidentialite-label">
						<value>ENGAGEMENT DE CONFIDENTIALITE</value>
					</text>
					<text id="engagement_de_confidentialite/engagement_lbl-label">
						<value>Je soussigné/e **<output value="/data/identite/genre_nom_complet" vellum:value="#form/identite/genre_nom_complet" />**, téléphone :  **<output value="/data/identite/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#form/identite/telephone_mm" />**,  exerçant les fonctions de **<output value="/data/identite/fonction" vellum:value="#form/identite/fonction" />**  au sein du Ministère de la Santé.

Dans le cadre de mes interventions, je suis amené/e à accéder à des données à caractère personnel et sensible.

Je m’engage en particulier à :

* ne pas utiliser les données auxquelles je peux accéder à des fins autres que celles prévues par mes attributions ;
* ne divulguer ces données qu’aux personnes dûment autorisées, en raison de leurs fonctions, à en recevoir communication, qu’il s’agisse de personnes privées, publiques, physiques ou morales ;
* ne faire aucune copie de ces données sauf à ce que cela soit nécessaire à l’exécution de mes fonctions ;
* prendre toutes les mesures conformes aux usages et à l’état de l’art dans le cadre de mes attributions afin d’éviter l’utilisation détournée ou frauduleuse de ces données ;
* prendre toutes précautions conformes aux usages et à l’état de l’art pour préserver la sécurité physique et logique de ces données ;
* m’assurer, dans la limite de mes attributions, que seuls des moyens de communication sécurisés seront utilisés pour transférer ces données ;
* en cas de cessation de mes fonctions, restituer intégralement les données, fichiers informatiques et tout support d’information relatif à ces données.

Cet engagement de confidentialité, en vigueur pendant toute la durée de mes fonctions, demeurera effectif, sans limitation de durée après la cessation de mes fonctions, quelle qu’en soit la cause, dès lors que cet engagement concerne l’utilisation et la communication de données à caractère personnel.

**J’ai été informé que toute violation du présent engagement m’expose à des sanctions disciplinaires et pénales conformément à la réglementation en vigueur, notamment au regard de la Loi n°2019-014 relative à la protection des données à caractère personnel.**



Fait à **<output value="/data/identite/region_nom" vellum:value="#form/identite/region_nom" />**, le **<output value="/data/identite/date_du_jour_format" vellum:value="#form/identite/date_du_jour_format" />**

**<output value="/data/identite/genre_nom_complet" vellum:value="#form/identite/genre_nom_complet" />**

-----------------------------------o-----------------------------------
</value>
						<value form="markdown">Je soussigné/e **<output value="/data/identite/genre_nom_complet" vellum:value="#form/identite/genre_nom_complet" />**, téléphone :  **<output value="/data/identite/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#form/identite/telephone_mm" />**,  exerçant les fonctions de **<output value="/data/identite/fonction" vellum:value="#form/identite/fonction" />**  au sein du Ministère de la Santé.

* prendre toutes précautions conformes aux usages et à l’état de l’art pour préserver la sécurité physique et logique de ces données ;
* m’assurer, dans la limite de mes attributions, que seuls des moyens de communication sécurisés seront utilisés pour transférer ces données ;
* en cas de cessation de mes fonctions, restituer intégralement les données, fichiers informatiques et tout support d’information relatif à ces données.

Cet engagement de confidentialité, en vigueur pendant toute la durée de mes fonctions, demeurera effectif, sans limitation de durée après la cessation de mes fonctions, quelle qu’en soit la cause, dès lors que cet engagement concerne l’utilisation et la communication de données à caractère personnel.

**J’ai été informé que toute violation du présent engagement m’expose à des sanctions disciplinaires et pénales conformément à la réglementation en vigueur, notamment au regard de la Loi n°2019-014 relative à la protection des données à caractère personnel.**



Fait à **<output value="/data/identite/region_nom" vellum:value="#form/identite/region_nom" />**, le **<output value="/data/identite/date_du_jour_format" vellum:value="#form/identite/date_du_jour_format" />**

**<output value="/data/identite/genre_nom_complet" vellum:value="#form/identite/genre_nom_complet" />**

-----------------------------------o-----------------------------------
</value>

		<vellum:hashtags>{"#user/username":null}</vellum:hashtags>
		<vellum:hashtagTransforms>{"prefixes":{"#user/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/"}}</vellum:hashtagTransforms>
	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/identite" ref="/data/identite" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('identite-label')" />
			<input vellum:ref="#form/identite/prenom" ref="/data/identite/prenom">
				<label ref="jr:itext('identite/prenom-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('identite/prenom-constraintMsg')" />
			</input>
			<input vellum:ref="#form/identite/nom" ref="/data/identite/nom">
				<label ref="jr:itext('identite/nom-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('identite/nom-constraintMsg')" />
			</input>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/identite/gender" ref="/data/identite/gender">
				<label ref="jr:itext('identite/gender-label')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('identite/gender-Homme-label')" />
					<value>Homme</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('identite/gender-Femme-label')" />
					<value>Femme</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
			<input vellum:ref="#form/identite/fonction" ref="/data/identite/fonction">
				<label ref="jr:itext('identite/fonction-label')" />
			</input>
			<input vellum:ref="#form/identite/telephone_mm" ref="/data/identite/telephone_mm" appearance="numeric">
				<label ref="jr:itext('identite/telephone_mm-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('identite/telephone_mm-constraintMsg')" />
			</input>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/recto" ref="/data/recto" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('recto-label')" />
			<upload mediatype="image/*" jr:imageDimensionScaledMax="1000px" vellum:ref="#form/recto/photo_nin_recto" ref="/data/recto/photo_nin_recto" appearance="acquire">
				<label ref="jr:itext('recto/photo_nin_recto-label')" />
			</upload>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/photo_verso" ref="/data/photo_verso" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('photo_verso-label')" />
			<upload mediatype="image/*" jr:imageDimensionScaledMax="1000px" vellum:ref="#form/photo_verso/photo_nin_verso" ref="/data/photo_verso/photo_nin_verso" appearance="acquire">
				<label ref="jr:itext('photo_verso/photo_nin_verso-label')" />
			</upload>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite" ref="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('engagement_de_confidentialite-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/engagement_lbl" ref="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/engagement_lbl" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('engagement_de_confidentialite/engagement_lbl-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<upload mediatype="image/*" vellum:ref="#form/engagement_de_confidentialite/signature" ref="/data/engagement_de_confidentialite/signature" appearance="signature">
				<label ref="jr:itext('engagement_de_confidentialite/signature-label')" />
			</upload>
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('grp_identite/type_piece-carte_de_sejour-label')"/>

        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('grp_identite/type_piece-carte_militaire-label')"/>

      <input vellum:ref="#form/grp_identite/nin_id" ref="/data/grp_identite/nin_id">

        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_identite/photo__output_valuedatagrp_identitephoto_value__fra-label')"/>

    <group vellum:ref="#form/qualif_fonction" ref="/data/qualif_fonction" appearance="field-list">

        <itemset nodeset="instance('worker_fonction_type')/worker_fonction_type_list/worker_fonction_type[niveau = /data/location_information/location_type]" vellum:nodeset="instance('worker_fonction_type')/worker_fonction_type_list/worker_fonction_type[niveau = #form/location_information/location_type]">

      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/qualif_fonction/fonction_code" ref="/data/qualif_fonction/fonction_code">

    <group vellum:ref="#form/grp_resume" ref="/data/grp_resume" appearance="field-list">

          <label ref="jr:itext('grp_resume/consentement_worker-okay-label')"/>

      <upload mediatype="image/*" vellum:ref="#form/grp_resume/signature" ref="/data/grp_resume/signature" appearance="signature">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_resume/signature-label')"/>

    </group>
    <group vellum:ref="#form/var" ref="/data/var">

    <group vellum:ref="#form/properties_display" ref="/data/properties_display"/>

_attachments.279af7eb54694d70a2a65e0351631504.xml:
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
  <h:head>
    <h:title>Supprimer Acteur</h:title>
    <model>
      <instance>
        <data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/1136737C-7D90-49E3-BC9D-5C2D7F998157" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Supprimer Acteur">
          <choose_action/>
          <grp_delete>
            <label_info_worker/>
            <confirm_deletion/>
            <raison_suppression/>
          </grp_delete>
        </data>
      </instance>
      <instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb"/>
      <instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/choose_action" nodeset="/data/choose_action" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_delete" nodeset="/data/grp_delete" vellum:relevant="#form/choose_action = 'Oui'" relevant="/data/choose_action = 'Oui'"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_delete/label_info_worker" nodeset="/data/grp_delete/label_info_worker"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_delete/confirm_deletion" nodeset="/data/grp_delete/confirm_deletion" required="true()"/>
      <bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_delete/raison_suppression" nodeset="/data/grp_delete/raison_suppression" type="xsd:string"/>
      <itext>
        <translation lang="fra" default="">
          <text id="choose_action-label">
            <value>Voulez-vous supprimer le travailleur ?</value>
          </text>
          <text id="choose_action-Oui-label">
            <value>Oui</value>
          </text>
          <text id="choose_action-Non-label">
            <value>Non</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete-label">
            <value>Supprimer le travailleur</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/label_info_worker-label">
            <value>* Nom complet : **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet"/>**
* Numéro de téléphone : **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm"/>**</value>
            <value form="markdown">* Nom complet : **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet"/>**
* Numéro de téléphone : **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm"/>**</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-label">
            <value>*Cette action est irréversible sur votre application. Vous devrez contacter un administrateur*

**Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer ce collaborateur ?**</value>
            <value form="markdown">*Cette action est irréversible sur votre application. Vous devrez contacter un administrateur*

**Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir supprimer ce collaborateur ?**</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-yes-label">
            <value>Oui</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-no-label">
            <value>Non</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/raison_suppression-label">
            <value>Pourquoi voulez-vous supprimer ce travailleur?</value>
          </text>
        </translation>
        <translation lang="en">
          <text id="choose_action-label">
            <value>Do you want to edit or delete the worker?</value>
          </text>
          <text id="choose_action-Oui-label">
            <value>Oui</value>
          </text>
          <text id="choose_action-Non-label">
            <value>Non</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete-label">
            <value>Delete Worker</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/label_info_worker-label">
            <value>* Full Name: **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet"/>**
* Phone Number: **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm"/>**</value>
            <value form="markdown">* Full Name: **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet"/>**
* Phone Number: **<output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm"/>**</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-label">
            <value>*This action is not reversible on your application. You will need to contact an administrator*

**Are you sure you want to delete this worker?**</value>
            <value form="markdown">*This action is not reversible on your application. You will need to contact an administrator*

**Are you sure you want to delete this worker?**</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-yes-label">
            <value>Yes</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/confirm_deletion-no-label">
            <value>No</value>
          </text>
          <text id="grp_delete/raison_suppression-label">
            <value>Pourquoi voulez-vous supprimer ce travailleur?</value>
          </text>
        </translation>
      </itext>
    </model>
    <vellum:hashtags>{"#case/nom_complet":null,"#case/telephone_mm":null}</vellum:hashtags>
    <vellum:hashtagTransforms>{"prefixes":{"#case/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/","#user/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/"}}</vellum:hashtagTransforms>
  </h:head>
  <h:body>
    <select1 vellum:ref="#form/choose_action" ref="/data/choose_action">
      <label ref="jr:itext('choose_action-label')"/>
      <item>
        <label ref="jr:itext('choose_action-Oui-label')"/>
        <value>Oui</value>
      </item>
      <item>
        <label ref="jr:itext('choose_action-Non-label')"/>
        <value>Non</value>
      </item>
    </select1>
    <group vellum:ref="#form/grp_delete" ref="/data/grp_delete" appearance="field-list">
      <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete-label')"/>
      <trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_delete/label_info_worker" ref="/data/grp_delete/label_info_worker" appearance="minimal">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete/label_info_worker-label')"/>
      </trigger>
      <select1 vellum:ref="#form/grp_delete/confirm_deletion" ref="/data/grp_delete/confirm_deletion">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete/confirm_deletion-label')"/>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete/confirm_deletion-yes-label')"/>
          <value>yes</value>
        </item>
        <item>
          <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete/confirm_deletion-no-label')"/>
          <value>no</value>
        </item>
      </select1>
      <input vellum:ref="#form/grp_delete/raison_suppression" ref="/data/grp_delete/raison_suppression">
        <label ref="jr:itext('grp_delete/raison_suppression-label')"/>
      </input>
    </group>
  </h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Modifier Infos Acteur</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/CE013979-1852-4A6D-AB7C-1A7BB7A1C444" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Modifier Infos Acteur">
					<var>
						<statut />
						<kyc_status />
						<nom_complet />
						<nom_unique />
						<url_photo>
							<url_photo_id />
							<url_photo_nin />
							<url_photo_signature />
							<url_photo_id_ucr />
							<url_photo_nin_ucr />
							<url_photo_signature_ucr />
						</url_photo>
						<travailleur_nouveau_id />
						<active_campaign />
						<travailleur_role_external_id />
						<travailleur_role_existe />
					</var>
					<location_information>
						<location_id />
						<location_code />
						<location_type />
						<location_nom />
						<affectation_done />
					</location_information>
					<grp_kyc_checks>
						<existence_mobile_money />
						<op_telecom_mm />
						<provider_kyc_code_display />
						<provider2_kyc_code_display />
						<kyc_validated />
						<kyc_nok />
						<kyc_validated_display />
					</grp_kyc_checks>
					<contact>
						<telephone_mm />
						<label_portabilite_1 vellum:comment="Display Condition :  not((#form/contact/op_telecom_mm = 'togocom' and (regex(#form/contact/telephone_mm, '^[9]{1}[0|1|2|3]{1}[0-9]{6}$') or regex(#form/contact/telephone_mm, '^[7]{1}[0|1|2|3]{1}[0-9]{6}$'))) or (#form/contact/op_telecom_mm = 'moov' and (regex(#form/contact/telephone_mm, '^[9]{1}[6|7|8|9]{1}[0-9]{6}$') or regex(#form/contact/telephone_mm, '^[7]{1}[6|7|8|9]{1}[0-9]{6}$')))) and #form/contact/telephone_mm != '' and #form/contact/op_telecom_mm != ''" />
						<numero_existe />
						<telephone_indicatif />
						<op_telecom_contact />
						<telephone_contact />
						<telephone />
					</contact>
					<grp_info_socio>
						<worker_information>
							<nom />
							<prenom />
							<date_de_naissance />
							<dob_display />
							<nom_majuscule />
							<prenom_format />
						</worker_information>
						<gender />
					</grp_info_socio>
					<grp_identite>
						<type_piece />
						<nin_id />
						<expiration_date_id_card />
						<confirmer_nouvelle_photo_nin />
						<nouvelle_photo_nin_grp>
							<photo_nin />
							<photo_nin_value />
							<photo_output_value />
						</nouvelle_photo_nin_grp>
					</grp_identite>
					<photo>
						<confirmer_nouvelle_photo_travailleur />
						<nouvelle_photo_travailleur_grp>
							<photo />
							<worker_photo_value />
						</nouvelle_photo_travailleur_grp>
					</photo>
					<qualif_fonction>
						<fonction_code />
						<fonction />
						<fonction_display />
					</qualif_fonction>
					<grp_resume>
						<label_resume_1 />
						<consentement_worker />
						<confirmer_changement_signature />
						<signature />
						<photo_signature />
						<date_dob_display />
					</grp_resume>
					<properties_display>
						<type_piece_display />
						<niveau_display />
					</properties_display>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:worker_fonction" id="worker_fonction" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:campagnes_label" id="campagnes_label" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/statut" nodeset="/data/var/statut" calculate=""modifié"" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/kyc_status" nodeset="/data/var/kyc_status" vellum:calculate="if(#form/contact/telephone_mm != #case/telephone_mm or #form/var/nom_complet != #case/nom_complet or #form/grp_identite/nin_id != #case/nin_id, '', #case/kyc_status)" calculate="if(/data/contact/telephone_mm != instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm or /data/var/nom_complet != instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet or /data/grp_identite/nin_id != instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nin_id, '', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/nom_complet" nodeset="/data/var/nom_complet" vellum:calculate="concat(#form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/nom_majuscule, " ", #form/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom_format)" calculate="concat(/data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/nom_majuscule, " ", /data/grp_info_socio/worker_information/prenom_format)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/nom_unique" nodeset="/data/var/nom_unique" vellum:calculate="concat(#form/var/nom_complet, " - ", #case/telephone_mm, " - ", #form/grp_resume/date_dob_display)" calculate="concat(/data/var/nom_complet, " - ", instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm, " - ", /data/grp_resume/date_dob_display)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/url_photo" nodeset="/data/var/url_photo" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/url_photo/url_photo_id" nodeset="/data/var/url_photo/url_photo_id" vellum:relevant="#form/photo/nouvelle_photo_travailleur_grp/worker_photo_value != ''" relevant="/data/photo/nouvelle_photo_travailleur_grp/worker_photo_value != ''" vellum:calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", #form/photo/nouvelle_photo_travailleur_grp/worker_photo_value)" calculate="concat("https://www.commcarehq.org/a/campaign-togo-1/api/form/attachment/", /data/meta/instanceID, "/", /data/photo/nouvelle_photo_travailleur_grp/worker_photo_value)" />

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Followup</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/C486EC4C-69F7-468B-AC16-3F18E337C7B2" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Followup">
					<kyc_status_check />
					<kyc_comment />
					<informations_de_lacteur>
						<informations_acteur />
						<lbl_kyc_encours />
						<lbl_kyc_ok />
						<lbl_kyc_non_ok />
						<lbl_kyc_ko />
					</informations_de_lacteur>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/kyc_status_check" nodeset="/data/kyc_status_check" vellum:calculate="cond(#case/kyc_status = 'OK', 'Validé', #case/kyc_status = 'KO', 'Rejeté', #case/kyc_status = 'NO ACCOUNT', 'Pas de compte Mobile Money', 'En cours de vérification')" calculate="cond(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'OK', 'Validé', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'KO', 'Rejeté', instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'NO ACCOUNT', 'Pas de compte Mobile Money', 'En cours de vérification')" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/kyc_comment" nodeset="/data/kyc_comment" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours" vellum:relevant="#case/kyc_status = ''" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = ''" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok" vellum:relevant="#case/kyc_status = 'OK'" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'OK'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_non_ok" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_non_ok" vellum:relevant="#case/kyc_status != 'OK'" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status != 'OK'" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ko" nodeset="/data/informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ko" vellum:relevant="#case/kyc_status = 'KO' and false()" relevant="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_status = 'KO' and false()" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/kyc_comment" ref="/data/kyc_comment" vellum:value="#case/kyc_comment" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_comment" />
			<itext>
				<translation lang="fra" default="">
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur-label">
						<value>Informations de l'acteur</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur-label">
						<value>### Informations

| Rubriques | Informations |
| --- | --- |
| Nom de l'acteur | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet" /> |
| Date de naissance | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_de_naissance" vellum:value="#case/date_de_naissance" /> |
| Pièce d'identité | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nin_id" vellum:value="#case/nin_id" /> |
| Téléphone | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm" /> |
| Statut KYC | <output value="/data/kyc_status_check" vellum:value="#form/kyc_status_check" /> |

***************************
</value>
						<value form="markdown">### Informations

| Rubriques | Informations |
| --- | --- |
| Nom de l'acteur | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet" /> |
| Date de naissance | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_de_naissance" vellum:value="#case/date_de_naissance" /> |
| Pièce d'identité | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nin_id" vellum:value="#case/nin_id" /> |
| Téléphone | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm" /> |
| Statut KYC | <output value="/data/kyc_status_check" vellum:value="#form/kyc_status_check" /> |

***************************
</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours-label">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone est en cours de validation.
Revenez plus tard pour plus d'informations.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok-label">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone a été vérifié et validé.
Vous pouvez maintenant affecter cet acteur à un rôle.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_non_ok-label">
						<value><output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_comment" vellum:value="#case/kyc_comment" /> </value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ko-label">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone ne correspond pas au nom enregistré. Si tel est le cas, veuillez vous rapprocher de votre opérateur pour résoudre ce problème.</value>
					</text>
				</translation>
				<translation lang="en">
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur-label">
						<value>Informations de l'acteur</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur-label">
						<value>### Informations

| Rubriques | Informations |
| --- | --- |
| Nom de l'acteur | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet" /> |
| Date de naissance | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_de_naissance" vellum:value="#case/date_de_naissance" /> |
| Pièce d'identité | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nin_id" vellum:value="#case/nin_id" /> |
| Téléphone | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm" /> |
| Statut KYC | <output value="/data/kyc_status_check" vellum:value="#form/kyc_status_check" /> |

***************************
</value>
						<value form="markdown">### Informations

| Rubriques | Informations |
| --- | --- |
| Nom de l'acteur | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nom_complet" vellum:value="#case/nom_complet" /> |
| Date de naissance | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_de_naissance" vellum:value="#case/date_de_naissance" /> |
| Pièce d'identité | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/nin_id" vellum:value="#case/nin_id" /> |
| Téléphone | <output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/telephone_mm" vellum:value="#case/telephone_mm" /> |
| Statut KYC | <output value="/data/kyc_status_check" vellum:value="#form/kyc_status_check" /> |

***************************
</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_encours-label">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone est en cours de validation.
Revenez plus tard pour plus d'informations.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ok-label">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone a été vérifié et validé.
Vous pouvez maintenant affecter cet acteur à un rôle.</value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_non_ok-label">
						<value><output value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/kyc_comment" vellum:value="#case/kyc_comment" /> </value>
					</text>
					<text id="informations_de_lacteur/lbl_kyc_ko-label">
						<value>Le numéro de téléphone ne correspond pas au nom enregistré. Si tel est le cas, veuillez vous rapprocher de votre opérateur pour résoudre ce problème.</value>
					</text>
				</translation>
			</itext>
		</model>
		<vellum:hashtags>{"#case/kyc_status":null,"#case/nom_complet":null,"#case/date_de_naissance":null,"#case/nin_id":null,"#case/telephone_mm":null}</vellum:hashtags>
		<vellum:hashtagTransforms>{"prefixes":{"#case/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/","#user/":"instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/"}}</vellum:hashtagTransforms>
	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_de_lacteur" ref="/data/informations_de_lacteur" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('informations_de_lacteur-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur" ref="/data/informations_de_lacteur/informations_acteur" appearance="minimal">

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Affectation des Acteurs</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/20AC9FC8-BE3F-43DE-B2F7-E36C398A46D1" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Affectation des Acteurs">
					<lang-code />
					<location_information>
						<location_id />
						<location_code />
						<location_type />
						<location_nom />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_code />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<region_code />
						<district_id />
						<district_code />
						<district_nom />
						<fosa_id />
						<fosa_code />
						<fosa_nom />
						<id_utilisateur />
					</location_information>
					<worker_details>
						<question1 />
						<phone_number_correct />
						<count_existing_roles />
						<worker_existing_roles ids="" count="" current_index="" vellum:role="Repeat">
							<item id="" index="" jr:template="">
								<role_id />
								<campagne_nom />
								<role_nom />
								<role_category />
								<role_infos />
							</item>
						</worker_existing_roles>
						<roles_assignes>
							<join_roles_infos />
							<tablea_header />
						</roles_assignes>
					</worker_details>
					<grp_category>
						<grp_category>
							<select_campaign />
							<worker_category />
						</grp_category>
						<grp_verification_category>
							<label_deja_enregistre />
							<warnning_deja_enregistre />
							<travailleur_role_id />
							<ancien_travailleur_role_display />
							<deja_enregistre />
							<update_travailleur_role_case vellum:case_type="'travailleur_role'" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
								<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
									<update>
										<travailleur_role />
										<travailleur_role_nom />
										<state />
									</update>
								</case>
							</update_travailleur_role_case>
						</grp_verification_category>
					</grp_category>
					<grp_resume>
						<label_resume_1 />
						<confirmation_infos />
						<date_dob_display />
					</grp_resume>
					<var>
						<create_child_case />
						<nom_complet />
						<campagne_id />
						<campagne_nom />
						<travailleur_role />
						<travailleur_role_nom />
						<travailleur_nouveau_id />
						<travailleur_role_external_id />
						<travailleur_role_existe />
						<concat_category_campaign />
						<fonction_code />
					</var>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:campagnes_label" id="campagnes_label" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:categorie_location_function" id="categorie_location_function" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/lang-code" nodeset="/data/lang-code" relevant="1 = 2" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information" nodeset="/data/location_information" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />

	<h:body>
		<trigger vellum:ref="#form/lang-code" ref="/data/lang-code" appearance="minimal">
			<label ref="jr:itext('lang-code-label')" />
		</trigger>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/location_information" ref="/data/location_information" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('location_information-label')" />
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/worker_details" ref="/data/worker_details" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('worker_details-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/worker_details/question1" ref="/data/worker_details/question1" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('worker_details/question1-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/worker_details/phone_number_correct" ref="/data/worker_details/phone_number_correct">
				<label ref="jr:itext('worker_details/phone_number_correct-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('worker_details/phone_number_correct-constraintMsg')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('worker_details/phone_number_correct-yes-label')" />
					<value>yes</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('worker_details/phone_number_correct-no-label')" />
					<value>no</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
			<group>
				<repeat jr:count="/data/worker_details/worker_existing_roles/@count" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/worker_details/worker_existing_roles/item" nodeset="/data/worker_details/worker_existing_roles/item" />
			</group>
			<group vellum:ref="#form/worker_details/roles_assignes" ref="/data/worker_details/roles_assignes">
				<label ref="jr:itext('worker_details/roles_assignes-label')" />
				<trigger vellum:ref="#form/worker_details/roles_assignes/tablea_header" ref="/data/worker_details/roles_assignes/tablea_header" appearance="minimal">
					<label ref="jr:itext('worker_details/roles_assignes/tablea_header-label')" />
				</trigger>
			</group>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_category" ref="/data/grp_category" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_category-label')" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_category/grp_category" ref="/data/grp_category/grp_category" appearance="field-list">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_category/grp_category-label')" />
				<select1 vellum:ref="#form/grp_category/grp_category/select_campaign" ref="/data/grp_category/grp_category/select_campaign">
					<label ref="jr:itext('grp_category/grp_category/select_campaign-label')" />
					<itemset nodeset="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label">
						<label ref="campagne_label" />
						<value ref="campagne_id" />
					</itemset>
				</select1>
				<select1 vellum:ref="#form/grp_category/grp_category/worker_category" ref="/data/grp_category/grp_category/worker_category">
					<label ref="jr:itext('grp_category/grp_category/worker_category-label')" />
					<itemset nodeset="instance('categorie_location_function')/categorie_location_function_list/categorie_location_function[location_type = /data/location_information/location_type and fonctions = /data/var/fonction_code]" vellum:nodeset="instance('categorie_location_function')/categorie_location_function_list/categorie_location_function[location_type = #form/location_information/location_type and fonctions = #form/var/fonction_code]">
						<label ref="categorie_name" />
						<value ref="categorie_code" />
						<sort ref="categorie_name" />
					</itemset>
				</select1>
			</group>
			<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_category/grp_verification_category" ref="/data/grp_category/grp_verification_category" appearance="field-list">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_category/grp_verification_category-label')" />
				<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_category/grp_verification_category/label_deja_enregistre" ref="/data/grp_category/grp_verification_category/label_deja_enregistre" appearance="minimal">
					<label ref="jr:itext('grp_category/grp_verification_category/label_deja_enregistre-label')" />
				</trigger>
				<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_category/grp_verification_category/warnning_deja_enregistre" ref="/data/grp_category/grp_verification_category/warnning_deja_enregistre" appearance="floating-bad">
					<label ref="jr:itext('grp_category/grp_verification_category/warnning_deja_enregistre-label')" />
				</trigger>
				<select vellum:ref="#form/grp_category/grp_verification_category/deja_enregistre" ref="/data/grp_category/grp_verification_category/deja_enregistre">
					<label ref="jr:itext('grp_category/grp_verification_category/deja_enregistre-label')" />
					<item>
						<label ref="jr:itext('grp_category/grp_verification_category/deja_enregistre-oui-label')" />
						<value>oui</value>
					</item>
				</select>
			</group>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_resume" ref="/data/grp_resume" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_resume-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_resume/label_resume_1" ref="/data/grp_resume/label_resume_1" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_resume/label_resume_1-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select vellum:ref="#form/grp_resume/confirmation_infos" ref="/data/grp_resume/confirmation_infos">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_resume/confirmation_infos-label')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('grp_resume/confirmation_infos-okay-label')" />
					<value>okay</value>
				</item>
			</select>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/var" ref="/data/var" />
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Synthèse des affectations</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/CC9E6C18-2368-4FA5-85BA-1BF96DD6651F" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Synthèse des affectations">
					<location_information>
						<location_id />
						<location_code />
						<location_type />
						<location_nom />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_code />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<region_code />
						<district_id />
						<district_code />
						<district_nom />
						<fosa_id />
						<fosa_code />
						<fosa_nom />
						<id_utilisateur />
						<validation_case_owner_id vellum:comment="Fall all levels, except FOSA, the person who submits the attendances is at the same level as the approvers" />
					</location_information>
					<campagne_id />
					<worker_category />
					<repeat_affectation ids="" count="" current_index="" vellum:role="Repeat">
						<item id="" index="" jr:template="">
							<categorie_code />
							<location_type />
							<display>
								<categorie_name />
								<nbr_affectation />
								<categorie_validated />
								<concat_affectations />
							</display>
						</item>
					</repeat_affectation>
					<display>
						<affectations_jointure />
						<display_all_affectations />
					</display>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:categorie_by_location" id="categorie_by_location" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/item-list:campagnes_label" id="campagnes_label" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information" nodeset="/data/location_information" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_id" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_code" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_code" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/location_id]/site_code" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/location_id]/site_code" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/location_information/location_type" nodeset="/data/location_information/location_type" vellum:calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = #form/location_information/location_id]/@type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = /data/location_information/location_id]/@type" />

', #form/repeat_affectation/item/display/concat_affectations)" calculate="join('
', /data/repeat_affectation/item/display/concat_affectations)" />

			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" ref="/data/repeat_affectation/@count" value="count-selected(/data/repeat_affectation/@ids)" />

| --- | --- |

	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/location_information" ref="/data/location_information" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('location_information-label')" />
		</group>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/campagne_id" ref="/data/campagne_id">
			<label ref="jr:itext('campagne_id-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label">
				<label ref="campagne_label" />
				<value ref="campagne_id" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/worker_category" ref="/data/worker_category">
			<label ref="jr:itext('worker_category-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = /data/location_information/location_type]" vellum:nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = #form/location_information/location_type]">
				<label ref="categorie_name" />
				<value ref="categorie_code" />
				<sort ref="categorie_name" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<group>
			<repeat jr:count="/data/repeat_affectation/@count" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat_affectation/item" nodeset="/data/repeat_affectation/item">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_affectation/item/display" ref="/data/repeat_affectation/item/display" />
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/display" ref="/data/display">
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/display/display_all_affectations" ref="/data/display/display_all_affectations" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('display/display_all_affectations-label')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>
