	</h:head>
	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/location_information" ref="/data/location_information" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('location_information-label')" />
		</group>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/campagne_id" ref="/data/campagne_id">
			<label ref="jr:itext('campagne_id-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('campagnes_label')/campagnes_label_list/campagnes_label">
				<label ref="campagne_label" />
				<value ref="campagne_id" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<input vellum:ref="#form/date_de_la_fiche_de_presence" ref="/data/date_de_la_fiche_de_presence">
			<label ref="jr:itext('date_de_la_fiche_de_presence-label')" />
		</input>
		<select1 vellum:ref="#form/worker_category" ref="/data/worker_category">
			<label ref="jr:itext('worker_category-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = /data/location_information/location_type]" vellum:nodeset="instance('categorie_by_location')/categorie_by_location_list/categorie_by_location[location_type = #form/location_information/location_type]">
				<label ref="categorie_name" />
				<value ref="categorie_code" />
				<sort ref="categorie_name" />
			</itemset>
		</select1>
		<select vellum:ref="#form/list_worker_present" ref="/data/list_worker_present">
			<label ref="jr:itext('list_worker_present-label')" />
			<itemset nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id][campagne_id = /data/campagne_id][travailleur_role = /data/worker_category][instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = index/parent]/kyc_status = 'OK']" vellum:nodeset="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'travailleur_role'][@status = 'open'][@owner_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id][campagne_id = #form/campagne_id][travailleur_role = #form/worker_category][instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = index/parent]/kyc_status = 'OK']">
				<label ref="nom_complet" />
				<value ref="@case_id" />
			</itemset>
		</select>
		<trigger vellum:ref="#form/lbl_no_worker_mobile" ref="/data/lbl_no_worker_mobile" appearance="minimal">
			<label ref="jr:itext('lbl_no_worker_mobile-label')" />
			<alert ref="jr:itext('lbl_no_worker_mobile-constraintMsg')" />
		</trigger>
		<group>
			<repeat vellum:jr__count="#form/count_workers" jr:count="/data/count_workers" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repeat_travailleur" nodeset="/data/repeat_travailleur">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display">
					<group vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group">
						<trigger vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/label_travailleur_name" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/label_travailleur_name" appearance="minimal">
							<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/label_travailleur_name-label')" />
						</trigger>
						<upload mediatype="image/*" vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/travailleur_signature" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/travailleur_signature" appearance="signature">
							<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/travailleur_signature-label')" />
						</upload>
						<upload mediatype="image/*" jr:imageDimensionScaledMax="1000px" vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/photo_travailleur" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/photo_travailleur" appearance="acquire">
							<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/display/display_group/photo_travailleur-label')" />
						</upload>
					</group>
					<trigger vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/label_fiche_deja_signe" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/label_fiche_deja_signe" appearance="minimal">
						<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/display/label_fiche_deja_signe-label')" />
					</trigger>
					<trigger vellum:ref="#form/repeat_travailleur/display/flag_quitter" ref="/data/repeat_travailleur/display/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
						<label ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/display/flag_quitter-label')" />
						<alert ref="jr:itext('repeat_travailleur/display/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
					</trigger>
				</group>
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<upload mediatype="image/*" jr:imageDimensionScaledMax="1000px" vellum:ref="#form/photo_fiche_de_presence_groupe" ref="/data/photo_fiche_de_presence_groupe" appearance="acquire">
			<label ref="jr:itext('photo_fiche_de_presence_groupe-label')" />
		</upload>
		<input vellum:ref="#form/attendance_gps_position" ref="/data/attendance_gps_position">
			<label ref="jr:itext('attendance_gps_position-label')" />
		</input>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_utilisateur" ref="/data/grp_utilisateur" appearance="field-list" />
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_workers_count" ref="/data/grp_workers_count" appearance="field-list" />
		<group vellum:ref="#form/case_validation" ref="/data/case_validation">
			<label ref="jr:itext('case_validation-label')" />
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/case_validation_update" ref="/data/case_validation_update">
			<label ref="jr:itext('case_validation_update-label')" />
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/resume" ref="/data/resume">
			<label ref="jr:itext('resume-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/resume/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" ref="/data/resume/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('resume/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/resume/tablea_header" ref="/data/resume/tablea_header" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('resume/tablea_header-label')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/var" ref="/data/var">
			<label ref="jr:itext('var-label')" />
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Valider Fiches de Présence</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/CC6DFB27-3BCD-4736-99E8-BCB5C5BF0720" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Valider Fiches de Présence">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<district_id />
						<district_nom />
						<fosa_id />
						<fosa_nom />
						<user_role />
						<user_val_step />
					</var>
					<grp_presence_validation_done vellum:comment="#form/var/prev_validation_status > instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/val_step">
						<label_already_recorded />
						<lbl_validated_attendance />
						<lbl_rejected_attendance />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_validation_done>
					<informations_fiche_de_presence>
						<lbl_attendance_summary />
						<lbl_validated_attendance />
						<lbl_rejected_attendance />
						<valider_fiche />
						<repreat_attendance jr:template="">
							<repeat_current_position />
							<attendance_caseid />
							<travailleur_nom />
							<travailleur_telephone />
							<valider_fiche />
							<var>
								<lbl_row_display />
								<validation_status />
								<validated_attendance_caseid />
								<validated_attendance_details />
								<rejected_attendance_caseid />
								<rejected_attendance_details />
							</var>
							<display>
								<update_attendance_case vellum:case_type="attendance" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
									<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
										<update>
											<validation_pev_dist />
											<date_validation_pev_dist />
											<validation_comp_dist />
											<date_validation_comp_dist />
											<validation_dps_dist />
											<date_validation_dps_dist />
											<validation_status />
											<date_validation_status />
										</update>
									</case>
								</update_attendance_case>
							</display>
						</repreat_attendance>
					</informations_fiche_de_presence>
					<grp_presence_ko_zero>
						<join_lbl_row_display />
						<lbl_summary_validation />
						<lbl_validation_details />
						<confirm_validation />
					</grp_presence_ko_zero>
					<save>
						<validation_status />
						<attendance_validation_step />
						<validated_attendance_caseids_current />
						<validated_attendance_caseids />
						<validated_attendance_count />
						<validated_attendance_details />
						<rejected_attendance_caseids_current />
						<rejected_attendance_caseids />
						<rejected_attendance_count />
						<rejected_attendance_details />
						<valider_pev_dist vellum:comment="and #form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche = 'oui'">
							<validation_pev_dist vellum:comment="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche" />
							<date_validation_pev_dist />
						</valider_pev_dist>
						<valider_comp_dist vellum:comment="and #form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche = 'oui'">
							<validation_comp_dist vellum:comment="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche" />
							<date_validation_comp_dist />
						</valider_comp_dist>
						<valider_dps_dist vellum:comment="and #form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche = 'oui'">
							<validation_dps_dist vellum:comment="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche" />
							<date_validation_dps_dist />
						</valider_dps_dist>
					</save>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_id" nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_name" nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />

				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />

		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" appearance="field-list">

				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/lbl_attendance_summary-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/lbl_validated_attendance" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/lbl_validated_attendance" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/lbl_validated_attendance-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/lbl_rejected_attendance" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/lbl_rejected_attendance" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/lbl_rejected_attendance-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" appearance="label">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-label')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-oui-label')" />
					<value>oui</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-non-label')" />
					<value>non</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
			<group>
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance-label')" />
				<repeat vellum:jr__count="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:count="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance">
					<select1 vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche" appearance="list-nolabel">
						<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche-label')" />
						<item>
							<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche-oui-label')" />
							<value>oui</value>
						</item>
						<item>
							<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/valider_fiche-non-label')" />
							<value>non</value>
						</item>
					</select1>
					<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/var" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/var" />
					<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/display" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/repreat_attendance/display" />
				</repeat>
			</group>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/lbl_summary_validation" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/lbl_summary_validation" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/lbl_summary_validation-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/lbl_validation_details" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/lbl_validation_details" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/lbl_validation_details-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/confirm_validation" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/confirm_validation">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/confirm_validation-label')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/confirm_validation-oui-label')" />
					<value>oui</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/save" ref="/data/save">
			<label ref="jr:itext('save-label')" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/save/valider_pev_dist" ref="/data/save/valider_pev_dist" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/save/valider_comp_dist" ref="/data/save/valider_comp_dist" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/save/valider_dps_dist" ref="/data/save/valider_dps_dist" />
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Copie de Valider Fiches de Présence</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/988BDAE4-41FA-47B4-A65A-112956FDAC52" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Copie de Valider Fiches de Présence">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<district_id />
						<district_nom />
						<fosa_id />
						<fosa_nom />
						<user_role />
						<user_val_step />
					</var>
					<grp_presence_validation_done>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_validation_done>
					<informations_fiche_de_presence>
						<attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t />
						<tablea_header />
						<valider_fiche />
					</informations_fiche_de_presence>
					<grp_presence_ko_zero>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_ko_zero>
					<repreat_attendance jr:template="">
						<repeat_current_position />
						<attendance_caseid />
						<display>
							<update_attendance_case vellum:case_type="attendance" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
								<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
									<update>
										<validation_pev_dist />
										<date_validation_pev_dist />
										<validation_comp_dist />
										<date_validation_comp_dist />
										<validation_dps_dist />
										<date_validation_dps_dist />
										<validation_status />
										<date_validation_status />
									</update>
								</case>
							</update_attendance_case>
						</display>
					</repreat_attendance>
					<save>
						<validation_status />
						<attendance_validation_step />
						<valider_pev_dist>
							<validation_pev_dist />
							<date_validation_pev_dist />
						</valider_pev_dist>
						<valider_comp_dist>
							<validation_comp_dist />
							<date_validation_comp_dist />
						</valider_comp_dist>
						<valider_dps_dist>
							<validation_dps_dist />
							<date_validation_dps_dist />
						</valider_dps_dist>
					</save>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_id" nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_name" nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_type" nodeset="/data/var/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/supply_point_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" vellum:calculate="#case/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/sort_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="if(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_du_jour" nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()" />

		<group vellum:ref="#form/var" ref="/data/var">

		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_validation_done" ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-label')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-oui-label')" />
					<value>oui</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-non-label')" />
					<value>non</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group>
			<label ref="jr:itext('repreat_attendance-label')" />
			<repeat vellum:jr__count="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:count="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repreat_attendance" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/repreat_attendance/display" ref="/data/repreat_attendance/display" />
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/save" ref="/data/save">
			<label ref="jr:itext('save-label')" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/save/valider_pev_dist" ref="/data/save/valider_pev_dist" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/save/valider_comp_dist" ref="/data/save/valider_comp_dist" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/save/valider_dps_dist" ref="/data/save/valider_dps_dist" />
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Valider Fiches de Présence </h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/1B04E5C2-8A6D-4C92-838F-9B0497A7E2DE" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Valider Fiches de Présence ">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<user_role />
						<user_val_step />
					</var>
					<grp_presence_validation_done>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_validation_done>
					<informations_fiche_de_presence>
						<attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t />
						<tablea_header />
						<valider_fiche />
					</informations_fiche_de_presence>
					<grp_presence_ko_zero>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_ko_zero>
					<repreat_attendance jr:template="">
						<repeat_current_position />
						<attendance_caseid />
						<display>
							<update_attendance_case vellum:case_type="attendance" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
								<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
									<update>
										<validation_pev_reg />
										<date_validation_pev_reg />
										<validation_comp_reg />
										<date_validation_comp_reg />
										<validation_dir_reg />
										<date_validation_dir_reg />
										<validation_status />
										<date_validation_status />
									</update>
								</case>
							</update_attendance_case>
						</display>
					</repreat_attendance>
					<save>
						<validation_status />
						<attendance_validation_step />
						<valider_pev_reg>
							<validation_pev_reg />
							<date_validation_pev_reg />
						</valider_pev_reg>
						<valider_comp_reg>
							<validation_comp_reg />
							<date_validation_comp_reg />
						</valider_comp_reg>
						<valider_dir_reg>
							<validation_dir_reg />
							<date_validation_dir_reg />
						</valider_dir_reg>
					</save>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_id" nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_name" nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_type" nodeset="/data/var/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/supply_point_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="#case/last_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" vellum:calculate="#case/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/sort_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="if(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_du_jour" nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_validation_format" nodeset="/data/var/date_validation_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/prev_validation_status" nodeset="/data/var/prev_validation_status" vellum:calculate="#case/category" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" nodeset="/data/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_id" nodeset="/data/var/pays_id" vellum:calculate="#case/pays_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_nom" nodeset="/data/var/pays_nom" vellum:calculate="#case/pays_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_id" nodeset="/data/var/region_id" vellum:calculate="#case/region_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/region_id" />

	<h:body>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/var" ref="/data/var">
			<label ref="jr:itext('var-label')" />
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_validation_done" ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" ref="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<select1 vellum:ref="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche" ref="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche">
				<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-label')" />
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-oui-label')" />
					<value>oui</value>
				</item>
				<item>
					<label ref="jr:itext('informations_fiche_de_presence/valider_fiche-non-label')" />
					<value>non</value>
				</item>
			</select1>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero" appearance="field-list">
			<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero-label')" />
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/label_already_recorded-label')" />
			</trigger>
			<trigger vellum:ref="#form/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" ref="/data/grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter" appearance="minimal">
				<label ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-label')" />
				<alert ref="jr:itext('grp_presence_ko_zero/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			</trigger>
		</group>
		<group>
			<label ref="jr:itext('repreat_attendance-label')" />
			<repeat vellum:jr__count="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:count="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" jr:noAddRemove="true()" vellum:nodeset="#form/repreat_attendance" nodeset="/data/repreat_attendance">
				<group vellum:ref="#form/repreat_attendance/display" ref="/data/repreat_attendance/display" />
			</repeat>
		</group>
		<group vellum:ref="#form/save" ref="/data/save">
			<label ref="jr:itext('save-label')" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/save/valider_pev_reg" ref="/data/save/valider_pev_reg" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/save/valider_comp_reg" ref="/data/save/valider_comp_reg" />
			<group vellum:ref="#form/save/valider_dir_reg" ref="/data/save/valider_dir_reg" />
		</group>
	</h:body>
</h:html>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Valider Fiches de Présence</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/8DEBF97B-6B9B-4561-8725-EA9415CCE40A" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Valider Fiches de Présence">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<district_id />
						<district_nom />
						<fosa_id />
						<fosa_nom />
						<user_role />
						<user_val_step />
					</var>
					<grp_presence_validation_done>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_validation_done>
					<informations_fiche_de_presence>
						<attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t />
						<tablea_header />
						<valider_fiche />
					</informations_fiche_de_presence>
					<grp_presence_ko_zero>
						<label_already_recorded />
						<flag_quitter />
					</grp_presence_ko_zero>
					<repreat_attendance jr:template="">
						<repeat_current_position />
						<attendance_caseid />
						<display>
							<update_attendance_case vellum:case_type="attendance" vellum:role="SaveToCase">
								<case xmlns="http://commcarehq.org/case/transaction/v2" case_id="" date_modified="" user_id="">
									<update>
										<validation_chef_div_immu />
										<date_validation_chef_div_immu />
										<validation_status />
										<date_validation_status />
									</update>
								</case>
							</update_attendance_case>
						</display>
					</repreat_attendance>
					<save>
						<validation_status />
						<attendance_validation_step />
						<validation_chef_div_immu />
						<date_validation_chef_div_immu />
					</save>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_id" nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_name" nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_type" nodeset="/data/var/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/supply_point_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="#case/last_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" vellum:calculate="#case/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/sort_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="if(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_du_jour" nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_validation_format" nodeset="/data/var/date_validation_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/prev_validation_status" nodeset="/data/var/prev_validation_status" vellum:calculate="#case/category" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" nodeset="/data/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_id" nodeset="/data/var/pays_id" vellum:calculate="#case/pays_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_nom" nodeset="/data/var/pays_nom" vellum:calculate="#case/pays_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_id" nodeset="/data/var/region_id" vellum:calculate="#case/region_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/region_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_nom" nodeset="/data/var/region_nom" vellum:calculate="#case/region_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/region_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/district_id" nodeset="/data/var/district_id" vellum:calculate="#case/district_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/district_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/district_nom" nodeset="/data/var/district_nom" vellum:calculate="#case/district_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/district_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/fosa_id" nodeset="/data/var/fosa_id" vellum:calculate="#case/fosa_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/fosa_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/fosa_nom" nodeset="/data/var/fosa_nom" vellum:calculate="#case/fosa_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/fosa_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/user_role" nodeset="/data/var/user_role" vellum:calculate="#user/user_role" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/user_role" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/user_val_step" nodeset="/data/var/user_val_step" vellum:calculate="#user/val_step" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_type = 'commcare-user'][hq_user_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/context/userid]/val_step" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_presence_validation_done" nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done" vellum:relevant="#form/var/prev_validation_status > instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/val_step" relevant="/data/var/prev_validation_status > instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/val_step" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/label_already_recorded" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" nodeset="/data/grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter" constraint="1 = 2" jr:constraintMsg="jr:itext('grp_presence_validation_done/flag_quitter-constraintMsg')" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" vellum:relevant="not(#form/var/prev_validation_status = 'validated')" relevant="not(/data/var/prev_validation_status = 'validated')" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" />

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
<h:html xmlns:h="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" xmlns:orx="http://openrosa.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2002/xforms" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:jr="http://openrosa.org/javarosa" xmlns:vellum="http://commcarehq.org/xforms/vellum">
	<h:head>
		<h:title>Statut des Fiches de Présence</h:title>
		<model>
			<instance>
				<data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/1B28368A-4B0E-4587-8A6A-624C8788544A" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Statut des Fiches de Présence">
					<var>
						<location_id />
						<location_name />
						<location_type />
						<supply_point_id vellum:comment="Get the case id of the supply point which is the supply_point_id of the location where the user is." />
						<count_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_attendance_caseids />
						<loaded_list_travailleur />
						<sort_list_display_values />
						<add_line_return_list_display_values />
						<list_display_values />
						<date_du_jour />
						<date_validation_format />
						<prev_validation_status />
						<last_attendance_submitted_time_format />
						<pays_id />
						<pays_nom />
						<region_id />
						<region_nom />
						<district_id />
						<district_nom />
						<fosa_id />
						<fosa_nom />
					</var>
					<informations_fiche_de_presence>
						<attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t />
						<tablea_header />
					</informations_fiche_de_presence>
				</data>
			</instance>
			<instance src="jr://instance/session" id="commcaresession" />
			<instance src="jr://instance/casedb" id="casedb" />
			<instance src="jr://fixture/locations" id="locations" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var" nodeset="/data/var" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_id" nodeset="/data/var/location_id" calculate="instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_name" nodeset="/data/var/location_name" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/name" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/location_type" nodeset="/data/var/location_type" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/location_type" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/supply_point_id" nodeset="/data/var/supply_point_id" calculate="instance('locations')/locations/location[@id = instance('commcaresession')/session/user/data/commcare_location_id]/supply_point_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="#case/last_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" vellum:calculate="#case/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/sort_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/sort_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="if(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" calculate="if(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur != "", sort(string(/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur), true()), "")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/list_display_values" nodeset="/data/var/list_display_values" vellum:calculate="replace(#form/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" calculate="replace(/data/var/add_line_return_list_display_values, "_", " ")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_du_jour" nodeset="/data/var/date_du_jour" calculate="today()" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/date_validation_format" nodeset="/data/var/date_validation_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/date_validation), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/prev_validation_status" nodeset="/data/var/prev_validation_status" vellum:calculate="#case/category" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" nodeset="/data/var/last_attendance_submitted_time_format" vellum:calculate="format-date(date(#case/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" calculate="format-date(date(instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_submitted_time), "%e/%m/%Y")" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_id" nodeset="/data/var/pays_id" vellum:calculate="#case/pays_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/pays_nom" nodeset="/data/var/pays_nom" vellum:calculate="#case/pays_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/pays_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_id" nodeset="/data/var/region_id" vellum:calculate="#case/region_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/region_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/region_nom" nodeset="/data/var/region_nom" vellum:calculate="#case/region_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/region_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/district_id" nodeset="/data/var/district_id" vellum:calculate="#case/district_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/district_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/district_nom" nodeset="/data/var/district_nom" vellum:calculate="#case/district_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/district_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/fosa_id" nodeset="/data/var/fosa_id" vellum:calculate="#case/fosa_id" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/fosa_id" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/fosa_nom" nodeset="/data/var/fosa_nom" vellum:calculate="#case/fosa_nom" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/fosa_nom" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/attendance_location_name__attendance_location_type__travailleur_categorie_t" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" nodeset="/data/informations_fiche_de_presence/tablea_header" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" ref="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" vellum:value="#case/last_attendance_caseids" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/loaded_list_travailleur" ref="/data/var/loaded_list_travailleur" vellum:value="#case/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_join_travailleurs_attendance_info" />
			<setvalue event="xforms-ready" vellum:ref="#form/var/prev_validation_status" ref="/data/var/prev_validation_status" vellum:value="#case/category" value="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/category" />
			<itext>

	<h:head>

					<var>

			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/count_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/count_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="count-selected(#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" calculate="count-selected(/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids)" />
			<bind vellum:nodeset="#form/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" nodeset="/data/var/loaded_attendance_caseids" vellum:calculate="#case/last_attendance_caseids" calculate="instance('casedb')/casedb/case[@case_id = instance('commcaresession')/session/data/case_id]/last_attendance_caseids" />

")" calculate="replace(/data/var/sort_list_display_values, "@", "
")" />
